name: ai-copilot-drawer
title: AI Copilot Drawer
description: Right-edge AI Copilot drawer for the Dashboard module. A gradient-mark header sits over an Insights / Ask AI tab strip; the Insights tab shows a pulsing live-analysis note and a scrollable column of composed insight-card tiles, while the Ask AI tab shows a scrollable chat-message thread over a footer of suggestion-chip prompts and a chat-input composer. This component owns only the drawer chrome, tab regions and composition slots; the tiles, bubbles, chips and composer keep their own components (deps). Tabs are real buttons driven by aria-selected and [hidden] tabpanels; the close button and tabs carry hover, focus-visible and disabled states, and a `--drawer` modifier makes the chrome a fixed slide-in.
